zh.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德納阿爾德維可
zh.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: 荷蘭努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrijs van Doortoge於大約1290年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德納阿爾德維可時，她的父親Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode36歲，母親Ermgard van Naaldwijk32歲。她和Wouter II van Egmond至少有3個兒子。她去世於1323年9月11日在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆德享年34歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德。

zh-hans.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: 荷兰努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrijs van Doortoge于大约1290年出生在荷兰-拉藍德納阿爾德維可时，她的父亲Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode36岁，母亲Ermgard van Naaldwijk32岁。她和Wouter II van Egmond至少有3个儿子。她去世于1323年9月11日在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆德享年34岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrijs van Doortoge was born about 1290, in Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode, was 36 and her mother, Ermgard van Naaldwijk, was 32. She had at least 3 sons with Wouter II van Egmond. She died on 11 September 1323, in Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 34, and was buried in North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrijs van Doortoge est née environ 1290, à Naaldwijk, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ermgard van Naaldwijk, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Wouter II van Egmond. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1323, à Egmond, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrijs van Doortoge um 1290 in Naaldwijk, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode 36 und ihre Mutter Ermgard van Naaldwijk 32. Sie hatte mit Wouter II van Egmond mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 11. September 1323 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Egmond, Nord-Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrijs van Doortoge è nata il circa 1290 nel Naaldwijk, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ermgard van Naaldwijk, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Wouter II van Egmond. Morì il 11 settembre 1323, nel Egmond, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Egmond Abbey, Egmond, Noord-Holland, Net: オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド

ja.Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-hオランド
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrijs van Doortogeが約1290年にオランダズイド-hオランドナアルドウィジクで生まれた時，父Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederodeは36歳，母Ermgard van Naaldwijkは32歳であった。彼女はWouter II van Egmondとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1323年9月11日にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンドで34歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrijs van Doortoge(이)가 대략 1290년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 나알드위j크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermgard van Naaldwijk(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Wouter II van Egmond(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 9월 11일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond Abbey, Egmond, Noord-Holland, Net: Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: Santpoort-Noord, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrijs van Doortoge nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Naaldwijk, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ermgard van Naaldwijk, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Wouter II van Egmond. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1323, em Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrijs van Doortoge родилась около 1290 г. в местности наалдвиджк, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermgard van Naaldwijk, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Wouter II van Egmond. Она умерла 11 сентября 1323 г. в местности эгмонд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrijs van Doortoge nació aproximadamente 1290, en Naaldwijk, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ermgard van Naaldwijk, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Wouter II van Egmond. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1323, en Egmond, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Noord-Holland, Países Bajos.
